shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "cat package.json && printf '\\n--- jest config ---\\n' && cat jest.config.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "cat src/test/utils.spec.js && printf '\\n--- props tests ---\\n' && sed -n '1,240p' src/test/tooltip-props.spec.js"
/bin/bash -lc 'git log --oneline -8 && git remote -v && git grep -n "place-" $(git rev-list --all 2>/dev/null | head -20) -- src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx 2>/dev/null | head -30'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,180p' src/test/__snapshots__/tooltip-props.spec.js.snap && printf '\\n--- line refs ---\\n' && nl -ba src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx | sed -n '40,58p;210,240p;440,475p;512,530p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/utils/compute-positions.ts src/utils/compute-positions-types.d.ts src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx src/test/__snapshots__/tooltip-props.spec.js.snap'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
